personality: Warm, gossipy, shrewdly hospitable. Speaks with boisterous cheer and a keen eye for coin.

greetingPool.text: Welcome, welcome! Rest your feet and warm your belly. Ale or cider?
You look road-weary, friend. I have a bowl of stew and a clean bed waiting.
Come in from the cold! Every traveller deserves a warm hearth and honest company.

idlePool.text: The new batch of cider should be ready by week's end. Best I have brewed in years.
That merchant from Ravensgate left without paying. I never forget a debt, or a face.
